bridge.config_required: Please configure AI service in Settings first
bridge.connected: Connected to AI, ready to chat
bridge.wakeword_nudge: You skipped wake word setup before. You can enable it in Settings > General for hands-free wake.
bridge.no_provider: No AI service configured. Right-click the tray icon to open Settings
bridge.no_mic: No microphone detected. Will auto-connect when plugged in

board.title: Agent Board
board.empty: Waiting for Agent to push content…

config.title: Agent3 Settings
config.wizard_subtitle: Choose and configure a core brain to start experiencing your voice agent
config.wizard_openai_desc: The most powerful general experience with high-quality dialogue and natural voices. Requires an API account with billing enabled.
config.wizard_gemini_desc: Extremely fast responses with a free-tier quota. Perfect for experiencing low-latency multimodal voice interaction.
config.wizard_step2: Copy the Secret Key and paste it below
config.wizard_step3: Click "Connect Brain" and you're all set!
config.wizard_wakeword_subtitle: Final step (optional): set a wake word for hands-free use
config.wizard_wakeword_desc: You can set this now, or skip and do it later in Settings.
config.wizard_wakeword_record_hint: Record 3 samples first. Say the same wake phrase clearly each time.
config.wizard_wakeword_skipped: Skipped wake word setup. You can enable it later in General settings.
config.general_name_hint: Give your AI assistant a name. It will use this name to refer to itself.
config.autostart_hint: Automatically start Agent3 when you log in.
config.wakeword_hint: Record wake word samples and train a model. Agent will only start a conversation after hearing the wake word. When disabled, Agent always listens.
config.wakeword_record_hint: Record at least 3 samples (5 recommended). Say the wake word clearly each time.
config.wakeword_name_required: Please enter a wake word name
config.wakeword_record_too_short: Recording too short, please try again
config.wakeword_record_quality_short: Try a bit longer and say the full wake phrase
config.wakeword_record_quality_long: You can make it shorter (about 1-3 seconds)
config.wakeword_test_tip: Now say your wake phrase once to confirm it wakes successfully
config.wakeword_resume_hint: You skipped wake word setup before. Finish it now to wake your assistant hands-free.
config.sensory_banner: 🎙 Voice service handles real-time voice conversations (Realtime WebSocket API). Configure at least one voice service to start Agent.
config.voice_hint: Choose your AI assistant's voice. You can also switch by saying "use a male voice" or "use Puck's voice" during a conversation.
config.vision_hint: When enabled, Agent can capture screenshots and "see" the current screen to interact with browsers, apps, and other graphical interfaces. Requires a cognitive model that supports multimodal input (e.g. GPT-4o, Qwen-VL).
